title: Engineering Architecture Reviewer
description: Review scalability, security, maintainability, observability, deployment risk, and implementation roadmap.

fields.name: architecture
fields.label: Architecture description
fields.placeholder: Describe services, data flow, queues, APIs, clients

fields.name: risks
fields.label: Known risks
fields.placeholder: Scaling, migrations, vendor lock-in, background jobs

workflowSteps: Score scalability, security, maintainability, and observability.

scoringRules.label: Scalability
scoringRules.description: Traffic, caching, queues, and database scaling.

scoringRules.label: Security
scoringRules.description: Auth, secrets, data boundaries, and abuse controls.

sampleInput.stack: Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, Cloudflare Pages, Workers
sampleInput.architecture: Monolith Next.js app with API routes, Prisma data layer, background import jobs, local static build, and optional AI provider calls.
sampleInput.traffic: 50k MAU, 200 rps peak, imports can spike CPU
sampleInput.database: Postgres primary with backups, planned read replicas
sampleInput.deployment: Cloudflare Pages for frontend, Workers for APIs, preview deployments
sampleInput.auth: OAuth, RBAC, admin role, API keys for integrations
sampleInput.risks: Long-running imports, cache invalidation, schema migrations, provider failures
sampleInput.monitoring: Application logs, uptime checks, basic metrics, no distributed tracing yet
